ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

Off Calendar Aug-18-2020 Continued To Oct-06-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Asis appeared by zoom for Jessica Justino (Petitioner).

Ms. Asis requested a 30-day continuance stating that the petition for final distribution is just about ready to be filed, that the Executor discovered that a couple of the accounts had Beneficiaries on them and that they are re-working the accounting to reflect that. Status on close of estate is continued to October 6, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed by September 29, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
